productDisplayName: Converse Men's Chuck Taylor Print OX Black Canvas Shoe
description: CompositionCanvas upper in black canvas, red and green fine stitches and rubber outsoleshoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm waterThis All Star Chuck Taylor converse multicoloured pair with an Ox length heel counter supports ankle movement and protects it from injuries. Made of black canvas uppers and diamond-shaped ridges in the outsole, this pair is perfect for use on rough terraine. The carbon rubber outsole ensures longevity, strong grip and weather resistance, while the laces and metallic eyelets ensure a snug Fit as the shoe takes the shape of your feet. The original rubber toe box and toe guard give added protection to the feet, making it a perfect addition to your wardrobe. The fine green and red stitch detailing lends it an extra stylish edge.
